sink_impls.description: Implements Sink for the standard (grep-like) printer with full feature support
Implements Sink for JSON Lines format printer
Test utility Sink that captures all match/context/binary information
Generic wrapper Sink for closures accepting UTF-8 matches
Generic wrapper Sink for lossy UTF-8 conversion (replacements substituted for invalid bytes)
Generic wrapper Sink for closures accepting raw byte matches
Blanket impl allowing mutable references to Sink implementors to also implement Sink
Blanket impl allowing boxed Sink implementors to also implement Sink

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search
call_chain.description: Entry point: decides which search path to take (stdin, preprocessor, decompression, or direct file)

call_chain.name: SearchWorker::search_reader
call_chain.description: Called by search_preprocessor, search_decompress, search_path; delegates to search_reader function

call_chain.name: search_reader (free function)
call_chain.description: High-level dispatcher: matches on Printer enum to instantiate concrete Sink type

call_chain.name: Printer::Standard match arm
call_chain.description: Creates StandardSink via printer.sink_with_path() for Standard printer variant

call_chain.name: Printer::Summary match arm
call_chain.description: Creates SummarySink via printer.sink_with_path() for Summary printer variant

call_chain.name: Printer::JSON match arm
call_chain.description: Creates JSONSink via printer.sink_with_path() for JSON printer variant

call_chain.name: Standard::sink_with_path
call_chain.description: Instantiates StandardSink with optional file path for the standard printer

call_chain.name: JSON::sink_with_path
call_chain.description: Instantiates JSONSink with optional file path for the JSON printer

call_chain.name: Summary::sink_with_path
call_chain.description: Instantiates SummarySink with optional file path for the summary printer

call_chain.name: Searcher::search_reader
call_chain.description: Core searcher: accepts generic Sink and drives the search, calling Sink methods for matches/context

change_impact_map.change: Add new variant to Printer enum (e.g., Printer::CSV(grep::printer::CSV<W>))
Add new match arm in Printer::get_mut() for the new printer variant
Add new match arm in search_reader() function to handle CSV printer variant and instantiate CSVSink
Export new CSV printer types (CSV, CSVBuilder, CSVSink) in pub use statements; ensure feature gates if needed
NEW FILE: Create printer implementation with CSV struct, CSVBuilder, and CSVSink impl Sink block
Implement CSVSink::sink() and CSVSink::sink_with_path() factory methods (similar to standard/json/summary)
Implement Sink trait for CSVSink<'p, 's, M, W> with matched(), context(), finish() methods
Add CSV serialization crate (e.g., csv = "1.x") if not already present
Ensure grep-printer dependency is up-to-date (may be automatic if using workspace)
Add CLI argument parsing for --format=csv to select CSV printer when constructing Printer enum
